name: Taixtexa 6mm Machine + Ribber
shortDescription: A versatile 6mm metal-bed knitting machine with ribber, ideal for knitters who want durability and flexibility with yarn choices.
intro: At 6mm gauge this machine works beautifully with a wide range of yarns. The metal needle bed provides durability and smooth knitting.
ribberInfo: The included ribber expands the machine to double-bed knitting including ribbing and circular knitting.

whoItsFor.title: LK-150 knitters
whoItsFor.text: A natural upgrade that adds durability and ribber capability.

whoItsFor.title: New machine knitters
whoItsFor.text: A straightforward machine that allows you to grow your skills.

whoItsFor.title: Experienced machine knitters
whoItsFor.text: Offers control and flexibility with a wide range of yarns.

name: SK-280 Punchcard Knitting Machine
shortDescription: A reliable 4.5mm metal-bed punchcard knitting machine with 200 needles and a 24-stitch pattern repeat.
intro: The SK-280 is a standard gauge punchcard knitting machine designed for knitters who want automatic stitch patterning without electronics.

name: Taitexma 160
shortDescription: A durable 6mm metal-bed knitting machine that works with a wide range of yarns. A great upgrade from the LK-150 and a dependable everyday machine for knitters who want simplicity and reliability.
intro: At 6mm gauge, the Taitexma knitting machine works beautifully with a wide range of yarns. The metal needle bed provides durability and smooth knitting that will last for years. This machine gives you the essential functionality of a knitting machine without the complexity of punchcards or electronics.

whoItsFor.title: LK-150 knitters
whoItsFor.text: Upgrade to a metal-bed machine and enjoy the added durability and expanded knitting capabilities.

whoItsFor.title: New machine knitters
whoItsFor.text: The learning curve is very approachable. Take it step by step and you'll be using the machine comfortably in no time.

whoItsFor.title: Experienced machine knitters
whoItsFor.text: You'll appreciate the quality of the machine, the flexibility of the 6mm gauge, and the control you have over your knitting.

features: 6mm gauge – works with a wide range of yarns
Manual stitch techniques: slip, tuck, partial knitting, thread lace

warranty.us: 90 days labor on defects in materials and workmanship

shipping: Shipping available to US addresses only
